_readme: Auto-generated allow-list of /api/* routes that exist in www/server.js but have no prod redirect in www/_redirects. Task #450 freezes this list so any NEW dev-only route added going forward must either be ported to a Netlify function (with a www/_redirects rule) OR explicitly added here. The api-route-parity.test.js asserts every new entry's namespace prefix has a matching _notes entry explaining why it is dev-only — this satisfies the 'with a comment' requirement at namespace granularity (per-route comments for 245 grandfathered entries would be noise).

_notes./api/2fa/: Grandfathered (Task #450). 2FA flows currently served only by the dev express server; needs porting to Netlify functions before 2FA can ship in prod.
_notes./api/account/: Grandfathered. Self-service account deletion endpoint; dev-only until the prod-facing version lands.
_notes./api/additional-work/: Grandfathered. Provider in-job add-on flow; dev prototype.
_notes./api/admin/: Grandfathered. The bulk of the admin console is still served by the dev express server; each sub-namespace (marketing, hubspot, printful, designs, milestones, team-invites, etc.) needs its own port + redirect rule.
_notes./api/ai/: Grandfathered. Several AI helper endpoints (package-suggest, bid-strategy, match-providers, photo-diagnose, etc.) are dev-only; prod uses the routed /api/helpdesk + /api/notifications/* surface.
_notes./api/analytics/: Grandfathered. Internal analytics ping endpoint; dev-only telemetry path.
_notes./api/auth/: Grandfathered. Dev-only check-access guard; prod auth flows go through Supabase + the routed /api/auth/facebook/* surface.
_notes./api/auto-bid/: Grandfathered. Auto-bid engine endpoints; dev-only background-job triggers.
_notes./api/bgcheck/: Grandfathered. Older background-check endpoints; superseded in prod by the routed /api/provider/bgc/* + /api/webhooks/background-check surface (Task #372).
_notes./api/bids: Grandfathered. Bidding marketplace endpoint family; dev-only until port.
_notes./api/booking/: Grandfathered. Member booking lifecycle endpoints; dev-only.
_notes./api/care-plans/: Grandfathered. Care-plan completion lifecycle endpoints; dev-only until port.
_notes./api/clover/: Grandfathered. Clover POS integration; dev-only pilot.
_notes./api/config: Grandfathered. Public client config bootstrap; the production path is the routed /api/stripe-key + /api/config/stripe.
_notes./api/developer/: Grandfathered. Developer API key management for the Automotive AI API; dev-only management UI.
_notes./api/dream-car/: Grandfathered. Dream Car Finder background scheduler; dev-only.
_notes./api/email/: Grandfathered. Transactional email triggers; dev-only — prod uses the agent fleet + Resend webhooks.
_notes./api/escrow/: Grandfathered. Escrow creation endpoint; dev-only — prod uses the routed Stripe Connect endpoints.
_notes./api/followups/: Grandfathered. Followup processor trigger; dev-only background job.
_notes./api/founder/: Grandfathered. Founder referral program endpoints; dev-only.
_notes./api/maintenance/: Grandfathered. Maintenance reminder checker; dev-only background trigger.
_notes./api/member/: Grandfathered. Member onboarding/survey/refunds/service-history endpoints; dev-only until port.
_notes./api/obd/: Grandfathered. OBD code scanning + OCR; dev-only.
_notes./api/pos/: Grandfathered. Generic POS integration endpoints; dev-only.
_notes./api/privacy-request: Grandfathered. GDPR/CCPA privacy request endpoint; dev-only.
_notes./api/provider/: Grandfathered. Provider portal endpoints (availability, profile, packages, push, referral, etc.); most still served by dev express server. Prod exposes the routed /api/provider/{apply,document,external-review,reference,finalize,initiate-background-check,bgc/*} subset.
_notes./api/provider-verification-status/: Grandfathered. Provider verification status lookup; dev-only.
_notes./api/square/: Grandfathered. Square POS integration; dev-only pilot.
_notes./api/survey/: Mixed. Five routed prod handlers exist (Task #343); any /api/survey/* literal not in _redirects must be ported.
_notes./api/push/: Grandfathered. Web-push subscription endpoints (register, subscribe, vapid-key, etc.); dev-only — prod push is handled by FCM via the routed /api/notifications/* surface.
_notes./api/referral/: Grandfathered. Generic referral apply/complete; dev-only — prod uses the routed /api/provider-referral/* surface.
_notes./api/shop/: Grandfathered. Provider Shop SaaS endpoints (book, checkout, onboarding-status, products, walkin-save); dev-only.
_notes./api/sms/: Grandfathered. Generic SMS inbound webhook; dev-only — prod uses the routed /api/twilio/sms-inbound.
_notes./api/split/: Mixed. The guest/paid split-pay flow is routed in prod (/api/split/guest-{details,pay,confirm}, /api/split/pay/*); the dev-only entries are admin-side helpers (create, create-additional, my-splits).
_notes./api/verify-admin-password: Grandfathered. Legacy admin password verifier; dev-only — prod admin endpoints all check x-admin-password header inline.
_notes./api/agreements/: Mixed. /api/agreements/sign is routed in prod; the dev-only /api/agreements/user/ lookup is dev-only.
